scene.message: Mark: That could work!!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Whoa?!{nl} A-are you serious?!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What is it, Inaba?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: It's Sonomura's{nl} compact...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: The mirror's{nl} not set in it...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Nanjo, hand it over!{waitkey}{ret}
There's a shard of the{nl} Mirror of Chaos!{waitkey}{ret}
Pick it up?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Mark: Perfect fit!!{wait_fr:88}{nl} Whoa?!{waitkey}{ret}
Obtained the Mirror Shard!{waitkey}{ret}
The real Maki won't wake...{nl} It's as if she's dead...{waitkey}{ret}
Obtained the Green Compact.{waitkey}{ret}
Obtained the{nl} Broken Compact.{waitkey}{ret}
